name: Mexican Orange Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Golden color and rich flavor are achieved by the caramelization of the sugar, and the addition of orange rind.
2. Melt 1 cup sugar in a heavy 3-quart saucepan, stirring constantly so it does not burn.
3. Very carefully, add boiling water to the mixture.
4. Add the remaining sugar, coffee cream, and salt.
5. Place over medium heat and stir until all ingredients are blended together and the mixture boils.
6. Cook to 238 degrees F without stirring.
7. Remove from heat and cool to lukewarm. Beat until candy loses its gloss and holds its shape.
8. Fold in grated orange rind and nuts.
9. Spread in a buttered 8-inch square pan.
10. Cut into squares. Makes about 48 pieces.
